imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-detailed kawaii scrapbook and handmade papercraft station diorama featuring stylish adult girl in a fluffy pale-pink teddy coat, white shirt, denim mini skirt, black tights, plush winter boots, white oval sunglasses, and black crossbody bag at Japanese train station platform during golden hour. Subject: stylish adult girl in a fluffy pale-pink teddy coat, white shirt, denim mini skirt, black tights, plush winter boots, white oval sunglasses, and black crossbody bag stands as the fashionable central character, rendered with realistic face and outfit detail while being surrounded by illustrated sticker elements and layered handmade paper textures. Scene: Japanese train station platform during golden hour becomes a miniature handmade station world with wooden posts, tracks, pastel buildings, Japanese-style signs, warm golden-hour light, and wooden station posts, train tracks, pastel buildings, clouds, Japanese signs, layered cardboard, and felt texture. Composition: Fixed symmetrical travel-diary diorama composition: central fashionable girl, layered cardboard station platform, scrapbook stickers arranged around the scene, polaroid frames and handwritten notes near the edges, and strong depth from stacked paper layers. Signature Elements: stylish adult girl in a fluffy pale-pink teddy coat, white shirt, denim mini skirt, black tights, plush winter boots, white oval sunglasses, and black crossbody bag, Japanese train station platform during golden hour, cherry blossoms, doodle hearts, sparkles, butterflies, polaroid frames, handwritten notes, camera illustrations, pastel luggage stickers, flowers, and warm coffee props, wooden station posts, train tracks, pastel buildings, clouds, Japanese signs, layered cardboard, and felt texture, chibi-cute travel stickers, Sakura or flower motifs, polaroid frames, handwritten notes, warm coffee prop, and handcrafted station diorama depth. Style: Kawaii scrapbook aesthetic fused with handcrafted 3D papercraft perspective model, clay-and-paper texture, stop-motion charm, social-media travel diary composition, trendy Pinterest-style softness, and high-resolution handcrafted detail. Color Palette: Dreamy pastel pinks, warm cream, soft golden light, gentle sky blue, muted station browns, candy-colored sticker accents, and bright-but-soft kawaii saturation. Lighting: Warm cinematic golden-hour light with soft shadows between layered paper pieces, gentle studio-render glow, and cozy dreamy atmosphere. Camera: Front-facing miniature diorama camera with slight depth, symmetric framing, readable central fashion character, and visible layered cut-paper edges. Materials: Layered cardboard, felt, clay-like miniature props, paper stickers, polaroid frames, handwritten notes, flower cutouts, camera illustrations, pastel luggage stickers, and cozy coffee-drink props. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
